chapter_title.en: The Exclusive Honors that Allah has Reserved for the Believers

text: : إن ذنوب المؤمن مغفورة، فيعمل المؤمن لما يستأنف، أما إنها ليست إلا لأهل الايمان.

en.muhajir-b-ali: 82. It has been narrated that one of them (al-Baqir or al-Sadiq (a.s)) said: Verily, the sins of a believer are forgiven. So, let the believer make a fresh start. But this privilege is only for the people of faith (ahl al-iman).
